_readme: Reference manifest for the AgileMood Azure Bot. Replace all placeholders before uploading to Azure/Teams: <TEAMS_APP_ID> → your Azure App (client) ID, <FRONTEND_URL> → your frontend base URL (e.g. https://agilemood.app).

description.short: Weekly mood reports and check-in reminders for agile teams.
description.full: AgileMood sends weekly mood report summaries to team managers and check-in reminders to team members via Microsoft Teams.
